preset_manifest.scope: schema-native public dictionary replication and hardening probe
preset_manifest.metadata_policy: public preset bytes are versioned and not stored per file; selector and version bytes are charged
preset_manifest.promotion_gate: standards-public-v1 must shrink at least three unrelated ordinary replication groups, controls and wrong/random/shadow baselines must stay null, and generic tokens must not explain the same groups

metadata_policy: public preset bytes are versioned and not stored per file; selector and version bytes are charged

summary.conclusion: Schema-native public dictionary replication does not yet survive the harder control gate.
